user_query:
I want a dry-run setup for a production-style daily auto-updater. Read these inputs and produce three artifacts:

- Read input/preferences.yaml for the schedule/timezone/session/missed-run policy and timeout settings.
- Read input/system_state.json for the current vs. latest versions of Clawdbot and each installed skill, plus any will_fail flags to simulate failures.
- Read input/run_date.txt for the YYYY-MM-DD date to use in the log filename and header.

Create the following files:
1) output/cron/daily-auto-update.json — a valid JSON cron configuration that:
   - Uses schedule.expr and schedule.tz from input/preferences.yaml
   - Sets missedRunPolicy to "run-immediately"
   - Uses payload.kind = "agentTurn", payload.timeoutSeconds = 600
   - Sets payload.message to a clear instruction to run daily auto-updates, run clawdbot doctor after updating, update all skills via "clawdhub update --all", and then report what changed. The message should be a single string.

2) output/reports/daily-auto-update-summary.txt — a human-readable summary that reflects the simulated update outcome using input/system_state.json:
   - Include a header indicating completion (add “(with issues)” if any will_fail is true)
   - Under a "Clawdbot" section, show the version change as v2026.1.9 → v2026.1.10 (if updated) using the provided versions
   - A "Skills Updated (N)" section listing each updated skill name and its version change (before → after)
   - A "Skills Failed (M)" section listing any skill with will_fail = true and mark it "Update failed"
   - A "Skills Already Current (K)" section listing skills where current_version == latest_version and will_fail is not true
   - End with a one-line status like "All updates completed successfully." or "Completed with 1 error." depending on failures

3) output/logs/openclaw-update-<DATE>.md — a six-phase style log named with the exact date from input/run_date.txt (e.g., output/logs/openclaw-update-2026-04-15.md). The log must be in English and include these sections and details:
   - Title: "# OpenClaw Update Log <DATE>"
   - "## Before Update" with lines for Start time, Current version (v2026.1.9), and Latest version (v2026.1.10)
   - "## During Update" noting Update start, Update command lines that include "clawdbot doctor" and "clawdhub update --all", Update completed, and a Verify version line
   - "## After Update" with Status: Updated, Report delivery: simulated success, and a Completed time
   - Explicitly note a 3-second disk sync wait and a 30-second restart delay somewhere in the log (e.g., "Disk sync wait: 3s" and "Restart delay: 30s")
   - "## Update Details" listing Updated skills (with before → after), Failed skills (with an error note), and Already current skills

Use only the provided inputs and write all outputs under the output/ directory.
